title: More Tier Equipments
description: This is a mod that adds more tiers of equipment in Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds more Tiers of Equiqments into Minecraft! Current Tiers include:

Ruby: Slightly worse than iron

Emerald: Better than iron

Ender: Best



 Tip: Ender Ingot: End stone on top, Ender Chest on bottom



Credits to: 

Planet Minecraft: Shark_cool

Ender texture pack: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ender-armor-5670174/



Planet Minecraft: JemFillex

Emerald texture pack: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/emerald-armor-and-tools-texturepack/
